purpose: Happy-path integrated SCM dataset for demos and smoke tests.
required_columns: order_id; order_date; supplier_id; supplier_name; sku; product_name; category; warehouse_id; warehouse_location; order_qty; received_qty; unit_cost; sales_qty; revenue; inventory_on_hand; reorder_point; lead_time_days; promised_date; delivery_date; shipment_id; carrier; freight_cost; production_batch_id; planned_units; actual_units; defect_units; purchase_cost; holding_cost; stockout_flag
example_edge_cases_included: fully populated canonical schema; on-time and late deliveries; stockout and non-stockout rows
app_features_tested: upload parsing, column mapping, data cleaning no-op, SCM dashboards, KPI calculation, chart generation
expected_behavior: App loads without warnings, computes KPIs, produces dashboards/charts, and exports successfully.

purpose: Messy but recoverable SCM data for cleaning pipelines.
required_columns: order_id; order_date; supplier_id; supplier_name; sku; product_name; category; warehouse_id; warehouse_location; order_qty; received_qty; unit_cost; sales_qty; revenue; inventory_on_hand; reorder_point; lead_time_days; promised_date; delivery_date; shipment_id; carrier; freight_cost; production_batch_id; planned_units; actual_units; defect_units; purchase_cost; holding_cost; stockout_flag
example_edge_cases_included: leading/trailing spaces; case inconsistency; numbers stored as strings; blank carrier values
app_features_tested: data cleaning, type coercion, trimming, dedup helpers, invalid-row reporting; numeric cleaning, thousands separators, negative/parentheses, percent/currency parsing
expected_behavior: App normalizes whitespace/case where configured, coerces numeric fields, flags unresolved blanks.

purpose: Schema validation fixture with critical canonical fields removed.
required_columns: order_id; order_date; supplier_name; sku; product_name; category; warehouse_id; warehouse_location; order_qty; received_qty; sales_qty; revenue; reorder_point; lead_time_days; promised_date; shipment_id; carrier; freight_cost; production_batch_id; planned_units; actual_units; defect_units; purchase_cost; holding_cost; stockout_flag
example_edge_cases_included: supplier_id missing; delivery_date missing; unit_cost missing; inventory_on_hand missing
app_features_tested: schema validation, friendly error messages, partial analysis blocking; column mapping validation
expected_behavior: App should block dependent KPIs and show clear missing-column guidance, not crash.

required_columns: order_id; order_date; supplier_id; supplier_name; sku; product_name; category; warehouse_id; warehouse_location; order_qty; received_qty; unit_cost; sales_qty; revenue; inventory_on_hand; reorder_point; lead_time_days; promised_date; delivery_date; shipment_id; carrier; freight_cost; production_batch_id; planned_units; actual_units; defect_units; purchase_cost; holding_cost; stockout_flag

expected_behavior: App reports missingness, excludes/handles rows safely in KPIs, charts do not fail.

required_columns: order_id; order_date; supplier_id; supplier_name; sku; product_name; category; warehouse_id; warehouse_location; order_qty; received_qty; unit_cost; sales_qty; revenue; inventory_on_hand; reorder_point; lead_time_days; promised_date; delivery_date; shipment_id; carrier; freight_cost; production_batch_id; planned_units; actual_units; defect_units; purchase_cost; holding_cost; stockout_flag

purpose: Medium-large dataset for performance and aggregation testing.

purpose: Small deterministic input for CLI smoke tests.

purpose: Canonical multi-sheet SCM workbook for integrated Excel ingestion.
required_sheets_if_excel: Orders; Suppliers; Products; Warehouse; Logistics; Production; Costs
required_columns: actual_units; carrier; category; defect_units; delivery_date; freight_cost; holding_cost; inventory_on_hand; order_date; order_id; order_qty; planned_units; product_name; production_batch_id; promised_date; purchase_cost; received_qty; reorder_point; revenue; shipment_id; sku; supplier_id; supplier_name; unit_cost; warehouse_id; warehouse_location
example_edge_cases_included: foreign-key-style joins across order_id/supplier_id/sku/shipment_id; separate domain sheets
app_features_tested: multi-sheet Excel ingestion, sheet selection, joins/merges, dashboard tabs, KPI calculation; supplier/logistics/warehouse/production/cost-specific dashboards and KPIs
expected_behavior: App lets user choose/join sheets or analyze domain tabs; KPIs match joined integrated data.

purpose: Column naming convention and mapping fixture.
required_columns: PO Number; Order Dt; Vendor Code; Vendor Name; Item Code; Item Description; Qty Ordered; Qty Received; Unit Price BDT; WH; ETA; Actual Arrival; Logistics Partner; Freight BDT
example_edge_cases_included: PO Number vs order_id; Vendor vs supplier; ETA vs promised_date; Actual Arrival vs delivery_date
app_features_tested: column mapping UI, synonym matching, canonical schema normalization
expected_behavior: App suggests or allows mapping synonyms to canonical SCM columns before analysis.

purpose: Empty sheet and header-only workbook fixture.

expected_behavior: App warns that there are no analyzable rows and does not crash during preview/export.
